# Auctra API

> An auction house that settles on Ethereum, exposed as a JSON API. English auctions — open bidding, ascending price, a clock — settled on-chain, with the blockchain plumbing handled for you.

Base URL: https://auctra-api-production.up.railway.app
Auth: Authorization: Bearer sk_test_...

## Get started
- [Introduction](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/introduction.html): What Auctra is, the signing model, and what you get.
- [Quickstart](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/quickstart.html): Key → auction → bid → settlement, in about 4 minutes.
- [Authentication](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/authentication.html): Secret keys and scopes.
- [Environments](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/environments.html): Sandbox (Sepolia) vs production.

## Core concepts
- [The signing model](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/signing-model.html): Why write endpoints return unsigned transactions instead of moving funds directly.
- [Auction lifecycle](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/auction-lifecycle.html): pending → live → ending → ended → settled / cancelled.
- [Errors](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/errors.html): The `{error: {...}}` shape and error codes.
- [Idempotency](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/idempotency.html): `Idempotency-Key` header behavior, 24-hour expiry.
- [Pagination](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/pagination.html): Cursor-based via `starting_after` and `next_cursor`.
- [Rate limits](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/rate-limits.html)
- [Webhooks](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/webhooks.html): HMAC-signed events, retried with backoff for 24 hours.

## Guides
- [Guide: list an item](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-list-an-item.html)
- [Guide: place a bid](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-place-a-bid.html)
- [Guide: settle and pay out](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-settle.html)

## Reference
- [API reference](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/api-reference.html): Every endpoint — Auctions, Bids, Refunds, Transactions, Webhooks, Health.
- [Changelog](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/changelog.html)
